# Overview

This section describes specific recommendations that offer expert opinions and actionable prescriptions in the context of the 📜 **Governance** space. Each article discusses various trade-offs and considerations to help you make informed decisions tailored to your unique context.

Articles in this section include:

*   Managing AI credits
*   Essentials of governance and administration with GitHub Enterprise
*   Governing agents in GitHub Enterprise
*   GitHub Enterprise Policies & Best Practices
*   Governing agentic workflows with gh-aw and APM
*   Managing Repositories at Scale
